falsification_rule_text: Not supported if (a) program_design_score has zero or negative effect on effectiveness ratios at p<0.10, OR (b) the rank-order of programmes by effectiveness does not match author-predicted rank (Korea K-Chips + China composite outperform US IRA + EU NZIA), OR (c) global clean-energy / semiconductor capacity addition exceeds pre-2022 trend by less than 10% (would refute the "step-change" framing — programs would just be redistribution), OR (d) the country-level effectiveness measure is dominated by GDP / pre-existing industrial base rather than program-design (no policy lesson).

variables_missing.name: program_design_score
variables_missing.source: constructed: ordinal score per country-program on three dimensions: (a) target clarity (single-technology vs portfolio); (b) price-signal complement (carbon price level, FIT design); (c) export discipline (Korean / Chinese model = high; US IRA = low). 0-9 ordinal scale, hand-coded with documented rubric.

variables_missing.name: post_2022_dummy
variables_missing.source: constructed: indicator = 1 from country-specific program enactment date onwards. US: 2022-08; EU CHIPS: 2023-09; EU CRMA: 2024-04; EU NZIA: 2024-06; JPN GX: 2023-02; KOR K-Chips: 2023-03; CHN: continuous.

variables_missing.name: real_interest_rate_country
variables_missing.source: constructed: imf:IFS_PMP / fred for USA / boe / boj / ecb. Composite.

variables_missing.name: pre_2022_industrial_policy_baseline_spend_share_gdp
variables_missing.source: constructed: oecd or country-specific tabulation of industrial-policy spending pre-2022, normalised by GDP. Used to net out pre-existing trajectory.
